name: Prophet's Porridge, Quick Cooking
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a heavy saucepan.
2. Stir until lumps are gone.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until porridge bubbles.
4. Turn off the heat.
5. Stir to desired thickness.
6. Serve plain or top with milk, fruit butter, or favorite topping. Makes 3 large servings.
